cover_letter:
18 July 2026

Hiring Team
Cortex Labs
Re: Program Manager

Dear Hiring Team at Cortex Labs,

My background as an Administrator is a direct match for the Program Manager role at Cortex Labs.

With over 15 years of program delivery experience, I currently lead end-to-end delivery for a multi-squad reform program at Australian Taxation Office, owning sprint cadence, PI planning, capacity management, and executive status reporting — exactly delivery ownership your Program Manager role demands. I recently authored an executive change request that re-baselined test capacity from 30 to 90 person-days, providing options analysis, risk assessment, and full traceability across 40 scenarios.

I also architected program’s test-automation strategy, building a COBOL/mainframe harness that cut evidence effort by 92% (from ~3 hours to ~15 minutes per scenario) across 200+ SIT/E2E scenarios for all eight squads, using a zero-new-approvals toolchain. To drive alignment, I convened a cross-discipline technical war room that delivered a binding automation recommendation in under three hours, demonstrating stakeholder communication and collaborative leadership you seek.

I am eager to bring this blend of agile-at-scale delivery and automation strategy to Cortex Labs, and I welcome chance to discuss how I can contribute to your team’s success.

Sincerely,
Administrator
